text.title: Creating or Updating Claude Code Commands Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to apply the commands methodology end-to-end.

step.name: decide-command-vs-skill
step.action: Estimate lines + stages. If > 250 lines OR > 1 stage OR auto-trigger needed → not a command.
step.decision-gate: If decision != command, STOP and apply the right component's methodology.

step.name: declare-frontmatter
step.action: Write frontmatter: name (kebab-case), description (≤ 300 chars), arguments (typed), tools (minimum whitelist).

step.name: write-body
step.action: Write the body in ≤ 150 lines (250 max). Use bullet lists. Inject live context via `!` prefix bash. No ASCII borders.

step.name: validate-and-test
step.action: Run validate-commands.py. /invoke once with typical args.
